checks.name: standard_verify
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: js_parse
checks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); for (const m of html.matchAll(/<script[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)) new Function(m[1]); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED')"

checks.name: canvas_policy_grep
checks.result: No alert/confirm/prompt or GEMINI_API_KEY validation matches. executeGAS(payload) call sites remain sync/init/load flows.

checks.name: recipe_array_parse_grep
